parsed.preview:
# Audit report: cursor-marketplace-demo-evidence

## Evaluation gate

Describe automated checks, test scope, and pass/fail criteria for this change set.

## Human approval gate

List required human reviewers, policy sign-off, and any staged rollout approvals.

## Risk assessment

Identify user, safety, security, and operational risks; note mitigations and residual risk.

## Rollback plan

Document how to revert or disable the change, data migration rollback (if any), and communication steps.
